prompt: I need an AHK v2 script that monitors a folder for new .txt files. When a new text file appears, it should read the contents and show a MsgBox with the filename and first line of the file. Also add a tray menu option to pause/resume monitoring.

assertions.name: uses-v2-syntax
assertions.text: The script uses AHK v2 syntax throughout (function call style, := assignment, quoted strings, no v1 command syntax)

assertions.name: no-v1-syntax
assertions.text: The script does not use any AHK v1 syntax (no command-style commas, no bare = assignments, no %Var% in expressions, no ErrorLevel usage)
